chapters.title: The Edge of the Woods
chapters.content: You stand at the edge of a mysterious forest. The trees seem to whisper secrets. A narrow path winds into the darkness, but you also notice a bright clearing to the right where you hear laughter.

choices.text: Take the dark path into the woods

comprehensionQuestion.question: Why might the dark path be risky?

chapters.title: The Whispering Trees
chapters.content: The path grows darker. Suddenly, a small fox with glowing eyes appears! 'Help me,' it says, 'I've lost my family. Will you help me find them?'

choices.text: I'm not sure... I need to find my way first

chapters.title: The Fairy Village
chapters.content: The clearing is full of tiny glowing fairies! They welcome you warmly. 'Welcome, traveler! Will you help us with a task? A dragon has taken our precious gem.'

choices.text: What will I get if I help?

chapters.title: The Fox's Family
chapters.content: You and the fox search the forest. After solving puzzles and following clues, you find a den with three fluffy kits! The fox family is reunited!

chapters.title: Alone in the Dark
chapters.content: You wander alone and get lost. Eventually you find your way out, but you wonder what would have happened if you had helped. Sometimes trying is what matters most.
chapters.moral: It's okay to be careful, but don't be too scared to try.

chapters.title: The Dragon's Cave
chapters.content: You journey to the mountain, outsmart the dragon with cleverness (not fighting!), and retrieve the gem. The fairies celebrate you as a hero!
chapters.moral: Brains beat brawn. Solving problems creatively is true bravery.

chapters.title: The Selfish Choice
chapters.content: The fairies look at each other disappointedly. 'We help because it's right,' they say. You leave with a gem, but feel empty inside. There's always another way.
chapters.moral: True reward comes from generosity, not selfishness.
